variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12309 Air Filter | Replaces the John Deere SA35945
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 12309 Air Filter | Replaces the John Deere SA35945
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 12309 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the John Deere SA35945. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12309 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 100.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 67.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 63.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 56.5 mm, Height 2 (H2): 51.0 mm
